description: Next Steps and module relationships for BMI Calculator within the SSA Planning Graph.

nextSteps.label: Calculate Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR)
nextSteps.reason: BMR uses BMI inputs to estimate calorie needs for baseline metabolism.

nextSteps.label: Calculate Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE)
nextSteps.reason: TDEE uses BMI + activity level to estimate daily calorie burn.

nextSteps.label: Generate Daily Macronutrient Targets
nextSteps.reason: Macros depend heavily on BMI, goal weight, and TDEE.

nextSteps.label: Check Daily Micronutrient Requirements
nextSteps.reason: Micronutrient needs differ for BMI categories and age/sex profiles.

nextSteps.label: Calculate Daily Water Requirements
nextSteps.reason: BMI influences body mass, which affects hydration levels.

nextSteps.label: Estimate Ideal Weight Range
nextSteps.reason: BMI result indicates whether a user should explore ideal body weight ranges.

suggestedModules.label: Meal Planning
suggestedModules.reason: Post-BMI nutrient guidance assists in planning meals and caloric targets.

suggestedModules.label: Activity & Exercise Planner
suggestedModules.reason: BMI influences recommended activity intensity and schedule.

suggestedModules.label: Set Health and Weight Goals
suggestedModules.reason: BMI category helps determine realistic short- and long-term health goals.

suggestedModules.label: Health Progress Tracker
suggestedModules.reason: Track BMI changes over time along with caloric intake and activity.

bmiOutput.reason: BMI is an influencing factor for metabolic rate estimations.
Body composition assumptions (lean vs adipose) are influenced by BMI.
Meal planning uses TDEE → which relies on BMI.
